calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Community Property And A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Amelia Frank.

Mr. Tamases stated Hegstaad would apply because they mention the property, that it is clear that he intended to include the property in the Trust, that he had read the Examiner's notes, and that if the property is not community property it is not a big deal; it will go by way of a bypass. At the conclusion of counsel's argument, the Court found that the property is a Trust asset but not community property. The petition was granted (an order for the same was signed in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
